  "text": "Both prometheus/prometheus and grafana/grafana make extensive use of OpenTelemetry spans for distributed tracing.\n\n## prometheus/prometheus\n\n**Tracer initialization** is managed in `tracing/tracing.go` via `buildTracerProvider()` and `NewManager()`. The provider is installed globally with `otel.SetTracerProvider(tp)`. Spans are created with `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, ...)` throughout the codebase:\n\n- `scrape/scrape.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Scrape\", trace.WithSpanKind(trace.SpanKindClient))` for scrape operations; also wraps the HTTP transport with `otelhttp.NewTransport`.\n- `storage/remote/client.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Remote Store\")` and `\"Remote Read\"` for remote write/read; uses `otelhttp.NewTransport`.\n- `storage/remote/queue_manager.go`: `createBatchSpan()` helper calls `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Remote Send Batch\")` and annotates with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.Int(...))`. Errors are recorded via `span.RecordError(err)`.\n- `rules/group.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"rule\")` for each rule evaluation with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(\"name\", rule.Name()))`.\n- `promql/engine.go`: spans on `query.Exec` (via `trace.SpanFromContext`) and `eval` (via `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start`) to trace query evaluation; attributes set with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(queryTag, ...))`.\n- `util/stats/query_stats.go`: `NewSpanTimer` creates spans via `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start` combined with timing.\n- `web/web.go`: HTTP server is wrapped with `otelhttp.NewHandler` for automatic span creation on incoming HTTP requests.\n\n## grafana/grafana\n\n**Tracer initialization** in `pkg/infra/tracing/tracing.go` via `initTracerProvider()` which builds an OTLP SDK TracerProvider and installs it with `otel.SetTracerProvider(tp)`. A `noopTracerProvider` is used when tracing is disabled.\n\n**Tracer acquisition** uses both `otel.Tracer(\"<scope>\")` (global, package-level `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)`) and dependency-injected `tracing.Tracer` interface instances. Key usage sites include:\n\n- `pkg/middleware/request_tracing.go`: HTTP middleware that extracts parent span context from incoming requests using `otel.GetTextMapPropagator().Extract(...)`.\n- `pkg/infra/httpclient/httpclientprovider/tracing_middleware.go`: outgoing HTTP client tracing middleware with `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError(err)`.\n- `pkg/bus/bus.go`: `b.tracer.Start(ctx, \"bus - \"+msgName)` for message bus dispatching with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(\"msg\", msgName))`.\n- `pkg/expr/` package: spans in `graph.go`, `nodes.go`, `service.go`, `commands.go`, `dataplane.go`, `hysteresis.go`, `transform.go`, `sql_command.go`, `sql/db.go` covering SSE pipeline execution, math/reduce/resample commands, data plane handling.\n- `pkg/tsdb/loki/loki.go` and `api.go`: spans for Loki query execution with `trace.WithAttributes(...)` options.\n- `pkg/tsdb/tempo/`: spans in `tempo.go`, `trace.go`, `traceql_query.go`, `search_stream.go`, `metrics_stream.go`; extensive `span.RecordError` + `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` error recording.\n- `pkg/tsdb/graphite/`, `pkg/tsdb/elasticsearch/`, `pkg/tsdb/grafana-pyroscope-datasource/`, `pkg/tsdb/parca/`: span-annotated datasource queries.\n- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/`: package-level `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)` in `acimpl/accesscontrol.go`, `api/api.go`, `ossaccesscontrol/datasource.go`; spans in evaluator, middleware, database, resource permissions, dualwrite.\n- `pkg/services/ngalert/`: spans for alert rule execution (`schedule/alert_rule.go`), recording rule execution (`schedule/recording_rule.go`), state calculation (`state/manager.go`), receiver/route services.\n- `pkg/services/sqlstore/database_wrapper.go` and `session.go`: database query tracing.\n- `pkg/storage/unified/` and `pkg/storage/secret/`: extensive span instrumentation across SQL backends, CDK bucket operations, access control, secret storage.\n- `pkg/modules/tracing/listener.go`: module lifecycle tracing with `span.SetStatus(codes.Ok/Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError`.\n- `pkg/plugins/manager/pipeline/`: each pipeline stage (discovery, bootstrap, initialization, validation, termination) has `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)` and creates spans.\n- `pkg/plugins/tracing/tracing.go`: helper `RecordPluginRequestError` that calls `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError`."
}

  "text": "Both prometheus/prometheus and grafana/grafana make extensive use of OpenTelemetry spans for distributed tracing.\n\n## prometheus/prometheus\n\n**Tracer initialization** is managed in `tracing/tracing.go` via `buildTracerProvider()` and `NewManager()`. The provider is installed globally with `otel.SetTracerProvider(tp)`. Spans are created with `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, ...)` throughout the codebase:\n\n- `scrape/scrape.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Scrape\", trace.WithSpanKind(trace.SpanKindClient))` for scrape operations; wraps the HTTP transport with `otelhttp.NewTransport`.\n- `storage/remote/client.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Remote Store\")` and `\"Remote Read\"` for remote write/read; uses `otelhttp.NewTransport`.\n- `storage/remote/queue_manager.go`: `createBatchSpan()` helper calls `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Remote Send Batch\")` and annotates with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.Int(...))`. Errors recorded via `span.RecordError(err)`.\n- `rules/group.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"rule\")` for each rule evaluation with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(\"name\", rule.Name()))`.\n- `promql/engine.go`: spans on `query.Exec` (via `trace.SpanFromContext`) and inner `eval` (via `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start`) to trace query evaluation; attributes set with `span.SetAttributes`.\n- `util/stats/query_stats.go`: `NewSpanTimer` creates spans via `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start` combined with timing.\n- `web/web.go`: HTTP server wrapped with `otelhttp.NewHandler` for automatic span creation on incoming HTTP requests.\n\n## grafana/grafana\n\n**Tracer initialization** in `pkg/infra/tracing/tracing.go` via `initTracerProvider()` which builds an OTLP SDK TracerProvider and installs it with `otel.SetTracerProvider(tp)`. A `noopTracerProvider` is used when tracing is disabled.\n\n**Tracer acquisition** uses both `otel.Tracer(\"<scope>\")` (global, package-level `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)`) and dependency-injected `tracing.Tracer` interface instances.\n\nKey span start/end/attribute/error patterns:\n- `pkg/middleware/request_tracing.go`: HTTP middleware extracting parent span context from incoming requests via `otel.GetTextMapPropagator().Extract(...)`.\n- `pkg/infra/httpclient/httpclientprovider/tracing_middleware.go`: outgoing HTTP client tracing with `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError(err)`.\n- `pkg/bus/bus.go`: `b.tracer.Start(ctx, \"bus - \"+msgName)` + `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(\"msg\", msgName))`.\n- `pkg/expr/` package: spans in graph.go, nodes.go, service.go, commands.go, dataplane.go, hysteresis.go, transform.go, sql_command.go, sql/db.go covering SSE pipeline execution, math/reduce/resample commands, data plane handling.\n- `pkg/tsdb/loki/loki.go` and `api.go`: spans for Loki query execution with `trace.WithAttributes(...)` options.\n- `pkg/tsdb/tempo/`: spans in tempo.go, trace.go, traceql_query.go, search_stream.go, metrics_stream.go; extensive `span.RecordError` + `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` error recording.\n- `pkg/tsdb/graphite/`, `pkg/tsdb/elasticsearch/`, `pkg/tsdb/grafana-pyroscope-datasource/`, `pkg/tsdb/parca/`: span-annotated datasource queries.\n- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/`: package-level `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)` in multiple files; spans in evaluator, middleware, database, resource permissions, dualwrite.\n- `pkg/services/ngalert/`: spans for alert rule execution, recording rule execution, state calculation, receiver/route services.\n- `pkg/services/sqlstore/database_wrapper.go` and `session.go`: database query tracing.\n- `pkg/storage/unified/` and `pkg/storage/secret/`: extensive span instrumentation across SQL backends, CDK bucket operations, access control, secret storage.\n- `pkg/modules/tracing/listener.go`: module lifecycle tracing with `span.SetStatus(codes.Ok/Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError`.\n- `pkg/plugins/manager/pipeline/`: each stage (discovery, bootstrap, initialization, validation, termination) acquires `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)` and creates spans.\n- `pkg/plugins/tracing/tracing.go`: helper that calls `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError` for plugin request errors."

The provider is installed globally with `otel.SetTracerProvider(tp)`. Spans are created with `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, ...)` throughout the codebase:\n\n- `scrape/scrape.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Scrape\", trace.WithSpanKind(trace.SpanKindClient))` for scrape operations; also wraps the HTTP transport with `otelhttp.NewTransport`.\n- `storage/remote/client.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Remote Store\")` and `\"Remote Read\"` for remote write/read; uses `otelhttp.NewTransport`.\n- `storage/remote/queue_manager.go`: `createBatchSpan()` helper calls `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"Remote Send Batch\")` and annotates with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.Int(...))`. Errors are recorded via `span.RecordError(err)`.\n- `rules/group.go`: `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start(ctx, \"rule\")` for each rule evaluation with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(\"name\", rule.Name()))`.\n- `promql/engine.go`: spans on `query.Exec` (via `trace.SpanFromContext`) and `eval` (via `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start`) to trace query evaluation; attributes set with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(queryTag, ...))`.\n- `util/stats/query_stats.go`: `NewSpanTimer` creates spans via `otel.Tracer(\"\").Start` combined with timing.\n- `web/web.go`: HTTP server is wrapped with `otelhttp.NewHandler` for automatic span creation on incoming HTTP requests.\n\n## grafana/grafana\n\n**Tracer initialization** in `pkg/infra/tracing/tracing.go` via `initTracerProvider()` which builds an OTLP SDK TracerProvider and installs it with `otel.SetTracerProvider(tp)`. A `noopTracerProvider` is used when tracing is disabled.\n\n**Tracer acquisition** uses both `otel.Tracer(\"<scope>\")` (global, package-level `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)`) and dependency-injected `tracing.Tracer` interface instances. Key usage sites include:\n\n- `pkg/middleware/request_tracing.go`: HTTP middleware that extracts parent span context from incoming requests using `otel.GetTextMapPropagator().Extract(...)`.\n- `pkg/infra/httpclient/httpclientprovider/tracing_middleware.go`: outgoing HTTP client tracing middleware with `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError(err)`.\n- `pkg/bus/bus.go`: `b.tracer.Start(ctx, \"bus - \"+msgName)` for message bus dispatching with `span.SetAttributes(attribute.String(\"msg\", msgName))`.\n- `pkg/expr/` package: spans in `graph.go`, `nodes.go`, `service.go`, `commands.go`, `dataplane.go`, `hysteresis.go`, `transform.go`, `sql_command.go`, `sql/db.go` covering SSE pipeline execution, math/reduce/resample commands, data plane handling.\n- `pkg/tsdb/loki/loki.go` and `api.go`: spans for Loki query execution with `trace.WithAttributes(...)` options.\n- `pkg/tsdb/tempo/`: spans in `tempo.go`, `trace.go`, `traceql_query.go`, `search_stream.go`, `metrics_stream.go`; extensive `span.RecordError` + `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` error recording.\n- `pkg/tsdb/graphite/`, `pkg/tsdb/elasticsearch/`, `pkg/tsdb/grafana-pyroscope-datasource/`, `pkg/tsdb/parca/`: span-annotated datasource queries.\n- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/`: package-level `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)` in `acimpl/accesscontrol.go`, `api/api.go`, `ossaccesscontrol/datasource.go`; spans in evaluator, middleware, database, resource permissions, dualwrite.\n- `pkg/services/ngalert/`: spans for alert rule execution (`schedule/alert_rule.go`), recording rule execution (`schedule/recording_rule.go`), state calculation (`state/manager.go`), receiver/route services.\n- `pkg/services/sqlstore/database_wrapper.go` and `session.go`: database query tracing.\n- `pkg/storage/unified/` and `pkg/storage/secret/`: extensive span instrumentation across SQL backends, CDK bucket operations, access control, secret storage.\n- `pkg/modules/tracing/listener.go`: module lifecycle tracing with `span.SetStatus(codes.Ok/Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError`.\n- `pkg/plugins/manager/pipeline/`: each pipeline stage (discovery, bootstrap, initialization, validation, termination) has `var tracer = otel.Tracer(...)` and creates spans.\n- `pkg/plugins/tracing/tracing.go`: helper `RecordPluginRequestError` that calls `span.SetStatus(codes.Error, ...)` and `span.RecordError`."
